events.description: segment opens, COMMIT OBJECT title fades in with icon
commit card container scales in, hash header visible
tree pointer field row slides up into card
author field row slides up into card
timestamp field row slides up into card
commit message field row slides up into card
CRUCIALLY moment — parent pointer field appears with intense glow pulse, KEY badge pops in
scene crossfades from commit anatomy to chain view
oldest commit node (f1a2b3) pops in on left
newest commit node HEAD (a3f7c2) pops in on right with active glow
parent pointer arrows draw right-to-left between all 3 commits, arrowheads appear
git history label badge glows in at bottom — final emphasis
